summary: User asks composer to take a list of URLs, scrape each, run the scraped text through an LLM transform with a summarisation prompt, and write the summaries to a JSON sink. Exercises web_scrape + llm plugins in combination — the URL-download-line-explode scenario uses web_scrape but not llm. Authored 2026-05-06 as part of Tier 1.5 Step B fan-out.
opening_prompt: Please create a pipeline that reads URLs one per line from /tmp/urls.txt, scrapes the content at each URL, runs each scraped page through an LLM with a summarisation prompt that produces a 3-sentence summary, and writes the summaries to /tmp/summaries.json.

build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.build_failure_note: Server-injected on completion-claim with failed preflight.

green_criteria.must_have_node_kinds_substring_any_of_no: Both web_scrape and llm transforms must be wired into a single pipeline. Either ordering counts as long as both are present and the sink consumes the LLM output.
